_meta._capture_origin: Claude Code hooks documentation, SessionStart event (snapshot 2026-05-04). Documented fields: session_id, transcript_path, cwd, hook_event_name, source ∈ {startup, resume, clear}. URL: https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/hooks
_meta._privacy_canary_field_rationale: session_id routes to PartialEvent.session_id (top-level Event column per SD §3.7.5), NOT to data. The canary fires if the adapter regresses and copies session_id into the data dict. SessionStart payloads have no §5-explicit drop-listed fields, so this 'drop-from-data, route-to-column' rule is the relevant invariant.
